name: Qián — The Creative
essence: Pure creative energy. The masculine face of God. The beginning of motion.
advice: Begin with courage. Strong time — for creation.

name: Kūn — The Receptive
essence: The pure receiving, nurturing, surrendering feminine principle.
advice: Don't act now — receive. To surrender is strength.

name: Zhūn — Difficulty at the Beginning
essence: Something newly born — patience needed to grow.
advice: Don't succeed alone — ask for help.

name: Méng — Youthful Folly
essence: Young ignorance — waiting to be educated by the wise.
advice: Accept what you don't know — that is the beginning of learning.

name: Xū — Waiting
essence: Patient waiting — knowing the right moment.
advice: Don't hurry. The right time will come.

name: Sòng — Conflict
essence: There is a conflict — even if half right, withdrawal is wisdom.
advice: Avoid argument today. Withdraw.

name: Shī — The Army
essence: Disciplined organisation of the community.
advice: Clarify your role inside a group.

name: Bǐ — Holding Together
essence: Time of genuine union — meeting of roots.
advice: Deepen a bond — not uniting but deepening.

name: Xiǎo Xù — The Taming Power of the Small
essence: Accumulating with small steps.
advice: Patience — small effect leads to great result.

name: Lǚ — Treading
essence: Walking carefully in a dangerous area.
advice: Be careful — one wrong step can cause harm.

name: Tài — Peace
essence: Heaven and earth are aligned — state of harmony.
advice: Earn this harmony. Live consciously.

name: Pǐ — Standstill
essence: Channels closed — now is the time to withdraw.
advice: Don't push. Flow is closed.

name: Tóng Rén — Fellowship
essence: Coming together for common purpose.
advice: Join a community — meaning is there.

name: Dà Yǒu — Possession in Great Measure
essence: To have much — carry with humility.
advice: There is abundance — don't be arrogant.

name: Qiān — Modesty
essence: The humility that holds the mountain beneath the earth.
advice: Today humility is the greatest power — use it.

name: Yù — Enthusiasm
essence: Divine energy rising from above the earth.
advice: Make room for music today. Enthusiasm is healing.

name: Suí — Following
essence: Following the right — conscious surrender.
advice: Today don't resist — follow the good direction.

name: Gǔ — Work on the Decayed
essence: Repairing something broken — a problem inherited generation to generation.
advice: Repair an old / family matter — fix it.

name: Lín — Approach
essence: The time of growth approaches — window of opportunity.
advice: Move today — the opportunity is now.

name: Guān — Contemplation
essence: To look from above — to see the whole.
advice: Today observe instead of action. Step to understand.

name: Shì Hé — Biting Through
essence: Biting through the obstacle with a decisive move.
advice: Today say a decisive 'yes' or 'no' to a postponed decision.

name: Bì — Grace
essence: Form and beauty — but built upon essence.
advice: Today add aesthetic to something — but without giving up essence.

name: Bō — Splitting Apart
essence: The old structure dissolving — accept rather than resist.
advice: Today accept a dissolving area. The new will come.

name: Fù — Return
essence: At the depth of darkness light is born — return.
advice: Today is the moment of 'starting again' — take a lesson from a mistake, begin.

name: Wú Wàng — Innocence
essence: Natural, sincere, uncalculated action.
advice: Today act without calculation, from what is inside.

name: Dà Xù — The Taming Power of the Great
essence: Accumulating great power through discipline.
advice: Today save your energy — for a big thing.

name: Yí — Nourishment
essence: How are you nourishing your body, mind and spirit?
advice: Today consciously review what you consume — food, content, relationship.

name: Dà Guò — Preponderance of the Great
essence: The load is exceeding capacity — quick action needed.
advice: Today drop 1 of the burdens you carry — immediately.

name: Kǎn — Abyss (Water)
essence: Continuous difficulty — but keep flowing.
advice: Today accept the 'continuity' of difficulty. Keep flowing.

name: Lí — Clinging (Fire)
essence: Double light — openness and bonding.
advice: Today bond to something — openly, without fear.

name: Xián — Influence
essence: Two things attract each other — a common area opens.
advice: Today turn toward something you feel pulled to — without seeking reason.

name: Héng — Duration
essence: Perseverance in long process — continuous like thunder and wind.
advice: Today preserve continuity — through small daily rituals.

name: Dùn — Retreat
essence: An honourable retreat — not war but protection.
advice: Today strategically withdraw from an area — not defeat.

name: Dà Zhuàng — Great Power
essence: You are very strong — carry the power consciously.
advice: Today use your power carefully — a wrong move causes big harm.

name: Jìn — Progress
essence: The sun rises — time for progress.
advice: Today be visible in some area — advance.

name: Míng Yí — Darkening of the Light
essence: Light under darkness — guard the inner light, hide outwardly.
advice: Today protect your inner light — don't share with everyone.

name: Jiā Rén — The Family
essence: Pay attention to family order — everyone's role clear.
advice: Today review home / family order — fix one small thing.

name: Kuí — Estrangement
essence: Two sides moved apart — small steps to build bond.
advice: Today send a small message to someone distant — build a bridge.

name: Jiǎn — Obstruction
essence: Big obstacle on the way — turning back and asking for help is wisdom.
advice: Today ask for help in an area where you are stuck.

name: Xiè — Deliverance
essence: A tension releases — after the storm.
advice: Today officially release a past tension.

name: Sǔn — Decrease
essence: Settling for less — approaching essence.
advice: Today let go of an unnecessary thing — open space.

name: Yì — Increase
essence: Abundance is flowing — sharing multiplies.
advice: Today give something to someone — abundance grows when shared.

name: Guài — Breakthrough
essence: Now is the time of decision — clear stance.
advice: Today say 'yes' or 'no' to a long-pending decision.

name: Gòu — Coming to Meet
essence: An encounter — both opportunity and temptation.
advice: Today look carefully at someone who appears before you — worth it or temptation?

name: Cuì — Gathering Together
essence: A community comes together — for common purpose.
advice: Today join a community — small is fine.

name: Shēng — Pushing Upward
essence: From seed to tree — slow and steady rise.
advice: Today take a small step toward a long-term goal.

name: Kùn — Oppression
essence: External resources exhausted — need to return to inner power.
advice: Today stop waiting from outside. What is inside?

name: Jǐng — The Well
essence: The well — for everyone. Continually gives, from the old to today.
advice: Today water your 'well' (talent, area) regularly.

name: Gé — Revolution
essence: The old state is no longer valid — revolution time.
advice: Today consciously let go of an old pattern. The new will come.

name: Dǐng — The Cauldron
essence: Everything is transformed in the cauldron — new form is born.
advice: Today something is 'cooking' inside you — give it time.

name: Zhèn — The Arousing (Thunder)
essence: Unexpected shake — for awakening.
advice: Today if a 'shake' came — it is the call to awaken.

name: Gěn — Keeping Still (Mountain)
essence: Total stillness — the deepest meditation.
advice: Today sit motionless for 10 minutes. Thought too still.

name: Jiàn — Gradual Development
essence: Slow but steady — to grow like a tree.
advice: Today practice patience. Don't speed up.

name: Guī Mèi — The Marrying Maiden
essence: A bond at the wrong time or with the wrong person — look carefully.
advice: Today question a bond — really right?

name: Fēng — Abundance
essence: The peak of abundance — but temporary.
advice: Today enjoy the moment of peak — consciously.

name: Lǚ — The Wanderer
essence: Living like a traveller — staying bound to no place.
advice: Today behave like a 'guest' somewhere — flexibility.

name: Xùn — The Gentle (Wind)
essence: Like the wind, gentle but continuous — even a great mountain wears down.
advice: Today be gentle but continuous — no hardness needed.

name: Duì — Joyous (Lake)
essence: Double lake — joy multiplies when shared.
advice: Today share a joy — with one person.

name: Huàn — Dispersion
essence: Hardness melted — flow begins again.
advice: Today soften a 'hardness' — toward yourself or another.

name: Jié — Limitation
essence: Without boundaries there is no flow — regular limitation.
advice: Today set a clear boundary in an area — eating, spending, time.

name: Zhōng Fú — Inner Truth
essence: Inner truth — alignment of word and action.
advice: Today actually do something you said. Align.

name: Xiǎo Guò — Preponderance of the Small
essence: Not the time for grandeur — attention to small details.
advice: Today fix a small detail — not a big plan.

name: Jì Jì — After Completion
essence: A cycle is complete — but prepare for new transformation.
advice: Today celebrate a completion — but don't fall asleep.

name: Wèi Jì — Before Completion
essence: Almost complete — but not yet. Caution and patience.
advice: Today take a matter to the end — don't leave half done.
